sourceAttribution: Hole geometry (tees, greens), par and stroke index derived from OpenStreetMap golf_course way 241777619 (Kiðjabergsvöllur). Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors, ODbL (https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright).
Green center uses each hole's mapped centerline green end; green front/back must be captured in Survey mode.
No data was taken from any proprietary commercial golf-GPS app or database.
Hazards (bunkers, water) derived from OpenStreetMap and assigned to the nearest hole(s) by playing line. Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors, ODbL.
Hole feature polygons (greens, fairways, bunkers, water, tees) from OpenStreetMap, ODbL. Elevation from Copernicus EU-DEM (25 m) via OpenTopoData.
notes: 18 distinct holes. OSM stroke-index tags are slightly inconsistent (holes 11 and 13 both tagged SI 6; SI 4 missing) — verify against the printed scorecard.

holes.notes: OSM stroke index duplicates hole 13 (SI 6); verify on scorecard.
OSM stroke index duplicates hole 11 (SI 6); verify on scorecard.
